data.body:
[Special Lunar New Year Gift]

Happy Lunar New Year, Sensei!
Log in now and grab this special new year gift!

🗓️Period: 2/10 (Sat) 3:00 AM – 2/17 (Sat) 2:59 PM (UTC)
➡️Special Gift: Pyroxene x1,200
